title: selaginella epirrhizos
intro: Selaginella epirrhizos, also known as Spikemoss or Rampike, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selaginella epirrhizos include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be dried or powdered for use in capsules or topical applications.
